title: phyllanthus incurvus
intro: Phyllanthus incurvus, also known as the curved-leaf phyllanthus, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae that is native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus incurvus include its ability to aid in the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve liver function. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus incurvus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its active compounds and harness its therapeutic benefits.
